items.title: Cursor Composer 2 is just Kimi K2.5 with RL
items.excerpt: Article URL: https://twitter.com/fynnso/status/2034706304875602030 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47452404 Points: 63 # Comments: 22
items.summary: A developer claims that Cursor's new Composer 2 AI coding assistant is essentially the Kimi K2.5 model enhanced with reinforcement learning. The technical comparison sparked discussion among programmers about AI model similarities in coding tools.
items.pullQuote: Cursor Composer 2 is just Kimi K2.5 with RL

items.title: Essex police pause facial recognition camera use after study finds racial bias
items.excerpt: Article URL: https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2026/mar/19/essex-police-pause-facial-recognition-camera-use-study-racial-bias Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47452248 Points: 13 # Comments: 10
items.summary: Essex police suspended their facial recognition camera program following research documenting significant racial bias in the technology. The study found the system disproportionately misidentified individuals from certain ethnic groups, raising civil liberties concerns.
items.pullQuote: facial recognition cameras show significant racial bias patterns

items.title: FSFE supporters affected: Payment provider Nexi cancelled us
items.excerpt: Article URL: https://fsfe.org/news/2026/news-20260316-01.en.html Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47451429 Points: 59 # Comments: 18
items.summary: The Free Software Foundation Europe lost its payment processing services when provider Nexi abruptly cancelled their account. The termination affects donation processing and highlights potential vulnerabilities for organizations advocating digital rights.
items.pullQuote: payment provider suddenly cancelled digital rights organization account
